parameters.query:
SELECT * 
FROM celery_result_taskresult
WHERE task_name = '{{ $json.taskName }}' 
AND date_done LIKE '%{{ $('Calculate Yesterday').first().json.check_date }}%'
ORDER BY date_done DESC 
LIMIT 1;

select 
  sep.employee_id, 
  sc.name as 'corporate', 
  si.name as 'insurer', 
  se.first_name,
  se.cnic,
  sep.policy_start, 
  sep.policy_end, 
  sep.card_no, 
  sep.created_date,
  scpp.policy_number, 
  scpp.parental_policy_number 
from smartbenefits_employee_product sep
join smartbenefits_health_plan shp on shp.id = sep.plan_id
join smartbenefits_insurer si on si.id = shp.insurer_id
join smartbenefits_employee se on se.id = sep.employee_id
join smartbenefits_corporate sc on sc.id = se.corporate_id
join smartbenefits_corporate_product_plan scpp on scpp.id = sep.corporate_plan_id
where 
  sep.product_id = 2 
  and si.id = 1
  and sc.id <> 34
  and sep.created_date < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) 
  and sep.card_no is null 
  and sep.policy_start < now() 
  and sep.policy_end > now()
order by 1 desc

options.initialComment: ={{ $('Analyze the Card Logic').all().length }} Employee's Card Number is not Available
